sentences.text: A quadratic function has the general form f(x) = ___x² + bx + c
sentences.hint: The leading coefficient — determines the parabola's width and direction.

sentences.text: The ___ of a parabola is the point where the curve changes direction
sentences.hint: The minimum or maximum point of the parabola.

sentences.text: The x-values where f(x) = 0 are called the ___ of the function
The ___ of symmetry of a parabola passes through its vertex
